user_task_description: Clean the bilingual report draft without paraphrasing the English or Chinese content.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Remove the visible Draft: prefixes, restore the report sections to Abstract, Key Findings, Tables & Data, and Conclusion, refresh the table of contents, keep the table values unchanged, and match the body style to the reference body paragraph.
atomic_scope: Only the bounded document-wide edits and structural changes explicitly requested.
expected_output_type: A revised .docx document that completes the requested single-document workflow.

notes.Task Notes: - Preserve unrelated content unless the task explicitly requires a change

required_paragraphs: This report summarizes the publication workflow.
This report also demonstrates mixed-language body handling.
English and Chinese body styles now match.
The table below summarizes the workload.
The report is ready for distribution.
forbidden_paragraphs: Draft: Remove this scratch section before publication.
